categories.label: Temple Victory Points
categories.description: VP earned from temple positions during the two end-of-age scoring rounds

categories.label: Temple Bonuses (Highest)
categories.description: Bonus VP for being the highest-ranked player on each temple at end of each age

categories.label: Crystal Skull VP (Chichen Itza)
categories.description: VP earned when placing crystal skulls on Chichen Itza action spaces

categories.label: Building VP
categories.description: VP from single-use buildings that grant immediate victory points

categories.label: Crystal Skulls Remaining
categories.description: 3 VP per crystal skull still in your possession at game end

categories.label: Corn & Resource VP
categories.description: Convert all resources to corn via market rate, then score 1 VP per 4 corn (round down)

categories.label: Unfed Worker Penalty
categories.description: -3 VP per worker you could not feed on a Food Day
